title: The Fight Against Kuro Nears Its End
description: On pages 13–16, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: You say that I am inferior to that "captain" in a kid's pirate game?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That's right

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha... you're so stupid!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't get cocky just because you've broken my "cat's claws"

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: In what way am I inferior to him!?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The way you think

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What?!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You don't know what a true pirate is supposed to be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: that kid...he saw through the captain's "silent step"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've insulted me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: You want to know what a true pirate is supposed to be? Then let me show you...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: together with the terror of a real pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: The terror of a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Who's been at the brink of death and survived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WaH, that stance is....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Don't tell me it's that special technique!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: against only one person?!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I... I'm pretty sure that's it....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the "Shaku- sh!"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: He's gonna use the "Shakushi"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We're not safe here either, right?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We can be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: His true intention is to kill us!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's what he said earlier!!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
